assertions.title: New plan route is accessible and functional

steps.expected: Page renders with chat input and plan display area
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully at /plan/new with chat input field and send button visible

steps.expected: Chat textbox is present and enabled
steps.observed: Textbox 'Chat message input' [ref=e6] is present; Send button disabled when empty (expected behavior)

assertions.title: Invalid plan ID shows not-found state

steps.expected: Application displays 'Plan not found' message with navigation back to dashboard
steps.observed: Page shows 'Plan not found' heading with message 'The plan you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.' and 'Back to Dashboard' link

steps.action: Request plan for Santa Monica College to UCLA CS
steps.expected: AI responds with no-data message for unsupported path
steps.observed: AI returned: 'No articulation data found for your specific path. We currently have data for select California community colleges transferring to UC and CSU schools...'

steps.action: Request plan for Pasadena City College to UC Berkeley CS
Request plan for De Anza College to UC Davis CS
steps.observed: AI returned same no-data message with isNoData: true flag

steps.action: Verify no semester grid is generated
steps.expected: No fake semester grid appears when no data exists
steps.observed: No semester grid rendered; only 'No Data Found' message displayed

evidence.network: Multiple POST /api/chat requests returning no-data responses

assertions.title: Semester grid renders after plan generation

steps.action: Attempt to generate plan for Santa Monica College to UCLA CS
steps.expected: Plan generates with semester grid showing courses
steps.observed: AI returned no-data message; no semester grid generated

steps.action: Attempt to generate plan for Pasadena City College to UC Berkeley CS
steps.expected: Plan generates with semester grid showing courses
steps.observed: AI returned no-data message; no semester grid generated

steps.action: Attempt to generate plan for De Anza College to UC Davis CS
steps.expected: Plan generates with semester grid showing courses
steps.observed: AI returned no-data message; no semester grid generated

assertions.issues: No articulation data exists in the database for tested California CC-to-UC paths. All tested combinations (SMC→UCLA, PCC→UCB, De Anza→UC Davis) returned no-data responses. The seed data appears to be missing or the articulation matching logic is not finding valid paths.

assertions.title: Semester and overall unit totals displayed

steps.action: Attempt to verify unit totals on generated plan
steps.expected: Semester unit totals and overall progress total are displayed and consistent with courses
steps.observed: Could not test - no plan with data was generated due to no-data responses

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - no plan with data could be generated to verify unit totals.

assertions.title: Plan shows prerequisite information

steps.action: Attempt to verify prerequisite information in semester grid
steps.expected: Courses show prerequisite info referencing prior semester courses
steps.observed: Could not test - no plan with data was generated

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-PLAN-001 - no plan with data could be generated to verify prerequisite display.

frictions.description: The AI response takes 30+ seconds to return even for 'no data' responses due to OpenRouter free tier rate limits (20 req/min). This causes the UI to appear unresponsive with no loading indicator visible in some cases.
frictions.resolution: N/A - rate limit is external dependency

frictions.description: The 'Failed to save plan. Please try again.' error message appears when AI returns isNoData: true response, suggesting the save logic is attempting to persist a plan even when no valid plan data exists.

Multiple California CC-to-UC paths that should have articulation data (per AGENTS.md seed data documentation) are returning no-data responses: Santa Monica College→UCLA CS, Pasadena City College→UC Berkeley CS, De Anza College→UC Davis CS.

blockers.description: No articulation data exists in the database for tested California CC-to-UC transfer paths. The AI consistently returns isNoData: true for SMC→UCLA CS, PCC→UC Berkeley CS, and De Anza→UC Davis CS. The seed data mentioned in AGENTS.md ('Seed data covers 5-10 California CC-to-university paths') does not appear to be present or the matching logic is not finding valid paths.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tested 3 different CC-to-UC paths that should have data per documentation, all returned no-data responses. Playbooks page also shows 'Coming Soon' with no data.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-PLAN-009, VAL-PLAN-011, VAL-PLAN-012), 3 blocked (VAL-PLAN-001, VAL-PLAN-002, VAL-PLAN-008). The blocked assertions could not be tested because no articulation data exists in the database for any tested California CC-to-UC transfer paths. The new plan route works correctly, invalid plan IDs show appropriate not-found states, and unsupported paths show clear no-data messages as expected.
